name: ux
description: The strongest UX plugin ever made. Review, generate, audit, and ship case studies grounded in Norman, Krug, Lean UX (Gothelf/Seiden + Klein), Laws of UX, Kocienda's Creative Selection, and the awwwards-grade frontend bar. Multi-mode platform with named slash commands, sub-agents, and Polaris-foundations house style. Cross-system, cross-stack.
